EVENTS.ADVANCEDONBOARDING_ASPIRATIONS_COMPLETIO: Eldöntötted, mire törekedjen a falvad! Ha meggondolod magad, bármikor felülvizsgálhatod a Falusi Törekvéseidet.
EVENTS.ADVANCEDONBOARDING_PREPARECOMPANY_DESC: Bár a harcosaid nagyon hálásak a várkastélyért, úgy érzik, hiányzik a felkészültségük a tényleges hadviseléshez. Értékelnék, ha tisztességes fegyvereket biztosítanál nekik, és hagynád, hogy segítsenek a falusi embereknek.
EVENTS.ADVANCEDONBOARDING_PREPARECOMPANY_COMPLE: A társaságod hamarosan akcióba lép! Biztosítsd, hogy megfelelően felszereltek, meggyógyultak és kiképzettek legyenek, amikor visszatérnek.
EVENTS.ADVANCEDONBOARDING_PREPARECOMPANY_QUEST_: Megígértem, hogy gondoskodni fogok a harcosaim szükségleteiről.
EVENTS.ADVANCEDONBOARDING_STARTINGCASTLE_DESC: A falusiaid kastélyról álmodnak! Ez biztonságosabbá tenné az utakat, és a társaságokra lehetne számítani veszélyes munkáknál. Azt mondják, egy pompás kastély akár a Király figyelmét is felkeltheti!
EVENTS.ADVANCEDONBOARDING_STARTINGCASTLE_COMPLE: Your castle is complete! Your first Company will be gathering at the Keep. Encampments are necessary to form additional Companies.
EVENTS.ADVANCEDONBOARDING_STARTINGCASTLE_QUEST_: I have agreed to build a castle in our village.
EVENTS.ADVANCEDONBOARDING_CRAFTINGSPEARS_DESC: Your combatants bear terrible news: there are no spears! They won't be able to do much without them, and training barehanded is insufficient. They suggest you start producing more - urgently!
EVENTS.ADVANCEDONBOARDING_CRAFTINGSPEARS_BOW_DE: Your combatants bear terrible news: there are no bows! They won't be able to do much without them, and training barehanded is insufficient. They suggest you start producing more - urgently!
EVENTS.ADVANCEDONBOARDING_CRAFTINGSPEARS_SWORD_: Your combatants bear terrible news: there are no swords! They won't be able to do much without them, and training barehanded is insufficient. They suggest you start producing more - urgently!
EVENTS.ADVANCEDONBOARDING_CRAFTINGSPEARS_COMPLE: With a new supply of weapons, your combatants will soon be ready to return to the battlefield. Be sure to keep your stock steady!
EVENTS.ADVANCEDONBOARDING_CRAFTINGSPEARS_QUEST_: I have promised to produce more weapons for my combatants.
EVENTS.ADVANCEDONBOARDING_CRAFTINGRATIONS_DESC: Your companies' great reputation has brought you new and exciting missions, though some are weeks of travel away. Since combatants won't fight on empty stomachs, you should start packing War Rations!
EVENTS.ADVANCEDONBOARDING_CRAFTINGRATIONS_COMPL: Famished no more, the combatants can hit the road! They suggest you keep the cooks cooking: Having more War Rations is always better than running out.
EVENTS.ADVANCEDONBOARDING_CRAFTINGRATIONS_QUEST: I have promised to produce War Rations for my combatants.
EVENTS.ADVANCEDONBOARDING_MONASTERYTRADEHERBS_D: Your Monastics harvested their first herbs! It's essential to sell these precious resources through trade routes to ensure the profitability of your Monastery. As your Monastery expands, you'll access even more valuable resources to trade.
EVENTS.ADVANCEDONBOARDING_MONASTERYTRADEHERBS_C: Let us provide for the needs of others.
Open up a trade route and sell herbs to a neighbouring village.
You have gained quite a bit from the trade! To increase your profit, produce more resources while improving Trade Routes.
EVENTS.ADVANCEDONBOARDING_MONASTERYTRADEHERBS_Q: I have agreed to sell herbs via Trade Routes.
EVENTS.BISHOPSTEWARD_GROUPKEY: The Bishop's steward is approaching your village
EVENTS.BISHOPSTEWARD_SUITE_GROUPKEY: The steward and his retinue are approaching your village
EVENTS.WANDERINGMONKS_GROUPKEY: The wandering monks are approaching your village
EVENTS.MYDDLEPEOPLE_GROUPKEY: The monks and their travelling companions are approaching your village
EVENTS.MERCHANTS_GROUPKEY: The merchants are approaching your village
EVENTS.MERCHANTS_ENVOY_GROUPKEY: The delegate and the merchants are approaching your village
EVENTS.TRADEROUTE_CASTLE HARBOR_1_DESC: The knights of Castle Harbor are looking for patrons to support a small diplomatic expedition. They expect this journey to greatly improve future trade relations.
EVENTS.TRADEROUTE_CASTLE HARBOR_2_DESC: The last expedition earned the knights new valuable allies who informed them of further realms of great wealth. Castle Harbour would like you to support such a promising expedition.
EVENTS.TRADEROUTE_CASTLE HARBOR_3_DESC: Thanks to your patronage, the influence of Castle Harbor extends far beyond our realm. Their knights see diplomatic opportunities in lands further away and hope for your assistance.
EVENTS.TRADEROUTE_CASTLE HARBOR_R_DESC: The knights of Castle Harbour appreciate trading with us! They have heard of distant realms they would like to partner with and would appreciate it if we could support them.
EVENTS.TRADEROUTE_CASTLE HARBOR_QUEST: War Ration delivery to Castle Harbor
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_1_DESC:
The Abbess heard you were interested in dedicating your land to the Clergy. She sees great potential and wants you to start immediately by founding a small monastery. 

She first suggests supporting your monastics by opening trade routes with your neighbours.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_1_CHOICE_A: I pledge my land to the Faith.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_1_CHOICE_A_TOO: The Abbess will expect you to build a monastery on your land.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_CHOICE_NO: We are not ready for this right now.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_CHOICE_NO_TOOLTIP: The Abbess will ask you again later.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_2_DESC:
The Abbess is pleased with the progress of your monastery and believes you should now aim to establish a Priory.

This would mean significantly increasing your population and establishing a Trade Route with Kinstone Abbey.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_2_CHOICE_A_TOO: The Abbess will expect you to expand your monastery.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_3_DESC:
The Abbess is delighted with the development of your Monastery. She envisions the potential for significant expansion by improving its luxury trade.

A realm of prosperity and grandeur like this would serve the Faith in many ways.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_3_CHOICE_A_TOO: The Abbess will expect you to improve your monastery and its trade.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_DESC:
The Abbess takes great pride in your accomplishments; your Priory stands as one of the crown jewels of our Faith! A monastery of such an esteemed reputation should seek to boast a thriving population, foster fair trading partnerships, and have a grand Abbatial Church.

Upon achieving these goals, the Abbess herself promises to bless your land.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_CHOICE_A: Our Priory will be known to all.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_CHOICE_A_TOO: The Abbess will expect you to expand your monastery and build an Abbatial Church.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_5_DESC: Your esteemed monastery, a pinnacle of its kind, has fulfilled the Abbess's aspirations. Eager to witness its success, she wishes to conclude your journey by staying in your revered land for a few months.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_5_CHOICE_A_TOO: The Abbess will expect to stay at your monastery for a few months.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_REWARD_DESC: In gratitude for your dedicated service to the Faith, the Abbess and Bishop wish to bestow upon you a generous donation of coins—vast riches meant to foster prosperity for the faithful within your monastery and beyond.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_REWARD_CHOICE_A: This blessing will serve a just cause!
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_REWARD_CHOICE_TOOLT: The Clergy will grant you riches.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_REWARD_COMPLETION_D: Your monastery earned the highest favour with the Clergy.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_1_SUCCESS_DESC: You dedicated your land to the Faith by building a monastery.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_2_SUCCESS_DESC: You developed your monastery into a renowned Priory.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_3_SUCCESS_DESC: You developed your Priory into a splendid economic hub.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_SUCCESS_DESC: You developed your Priory into a realm of wealth.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_5_FAILURE_DESC: The Abbess hopes her next visit will be more pleasant.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_5_SUCCESS_DESC: The Abbess had a pleasant stay and recognized the success of your Priory.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_1_QUEST_DESC: I have promised the Abbess we would build a monastery on our land.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_2_QUEST_DESC: I have promised the Abbess we would turn our monastery into a successful Priory.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_3_QUEST_DESC: I have promised the Abbess we would improve the wealth of our Priory.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_QUEST_DESC: I have promised the Abbess we would make our Priory renowned across the realm.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_5_QUEST_DESC: I have invited the Abbess to stay in our Priory for a few months.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_5_QUEST_OBJECT: Host the Abbess and her suite with 95% approval.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_5_QUEST_GROUPK: The Abbess and her suite are approaching your village.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_EVENT_1_A_DE: The Abbess envisions her stay as an opportunity to host a regional Mass. She anticipates a well-organised event that will draw pilgrims from across the region and trusts in your capability to host it gracefully.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_EVENT_1_A_CH: The Abbess will call for a large Mass, attracting pilgrims from around the region.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_EVENT_1_B_DE: The Abbess sees her stay as a chance to host an Abbey Council. Expecting a meticulously organised event attracting priors and prioresses region-wide, she trusts in your ability to host this significant gathering gracefully.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_EVENT_1_B_CH: The Abbess will call for an Abbey Council, attracting priors and prioresses from around the region.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_EVENT_1_C_DE: The Abbess envisions her stay as an opportunity to host a trade gathering. Anticipating a meticulously organised event that attracts traders from across the region, she trusts in your ability to host this significant gathering gracefully.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_EVENT_1_C_CH: The Abbess will call for a trade gathering, attracting wealthy traders from around the region.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_EVENT_1_CHOI: Another monastery would be more suitable.
Your best Emissary will make sure another monastery hosts.
The Bishop would be an ideal host.
You will use your influence to let the Bishop handle the event.
Refusing to host the event might disappoint the Abbess.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_EVENT_2_A_DE: Upon receiving a letter detailing the misfortune of a vital merchant for her monastery, the Abbess demands your intervention. Recognising your resourcefulness, she urges you to take swift action to safeguard her trader.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_EVENT_2_A_CH: A donation of coins should be suitable.
The Abbess will expect you to donate coins within the next few days.
We will provide them with new merchandise.
The Abbess will expect you to donate goods within the next few days.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_EVENT_2_B_DE: Upon receiving a letter detailing the fire in one of her monasteries' libraries, the Abbess demands your intervention. Recognising your resourcefulness, she urges you to take swift action to safeguard its knowledge.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_EVENT_2_B_CH: The Abbess will expect you to donate manuscripts within the next few days.
We have spare material for them.
The Abbess will expect you to donate construction materials within the next few days.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_EVENT_2_C_DE: Upon receiving a letter detailing a devastating storm in her hometown, the Abbess demands your intervention. Recognising your resourcefulness, she urges you to take swift action to prevent the village's end.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_EVENT_2_C_CH: The Abbess will expect you to donate berries within the next few days.
Our herbs will help them recover.
The Abbess will expect you to donate herbs within the next few days.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_EVENT_2_CHOI: I am sure the Bishop can help out.
You will use your influence to have the Bishop help out in your stead.
Refusing to help the Abbess might disappoint her.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_EVENT_3_A_DE:
As her stay nears its end, the Abbess decides on a final trial, asserting that a Priory's true worth lies in its wine. Beyond stone and scriptures, only the blessed aroma of grapes is eternal.

She then asks: Is your Priory worthy of the Faith?
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_EVENT_3_A_CH: Let my Vintners demonstrate their craftsmanship.
Your Best Vintner will attempt to amaze the Abbess.
My wine will speak for itself!
You will gift the Abbess a sizeable casket of wine.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_EVENT_3_B_DE:
As her stay nears its end, the Abbess decides on a final trial, asserting that a Priory's true worth lies in its stone. Beyond wealth and knowledge, only the hardship of the sacred stone is eternal.

She then asks: Is your Priory worthy of the Faith?
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_EVENT_3_B_CH: My monastery will speak for itself!
You will try to impress the Abbess with the Splendour of your Monastery.
Let my Builders tell you about their work.
Your best Builder will attempt to impress the Abbess.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_EVENT_3_C_DE:
As her stay nears its end, the Abbess decides on a final trial, asserting that a Priory's true worth lies in its knowledge. Beyond beauty and luxury, only the sanctity of erudition is eternal.

She then asks: Is your Priory worthy of the Faith?
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_EVENT_3_C_CH: See how well-educated my Copyists are!
Your best Copyist will attempt to impress the Abbess.
You will gift the Abbess a fair collection of manuscripts.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_EVENT_3_CHOI: You can ask my good friend the Bishop.
You will use your influence with the Bishop to awe the Abbess.
You will attempt to impress the Abbess yourself.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_EVENT_FAILUR: The Abbess is disappointed with your decision. This will impact her stay at your monastery.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_EVENT_SUCCES: The Abbess is satisfied with the latest turn of events. This will impact her stay at your monastery.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_EVENT_1_A_QU: I have promised the Abbess that I would host pilgrims for a Mass at our monastery.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_EVENT_1_B_QU: I have promised the Abbess to host an Abbey Council at our monastery.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_EVENT_1_C_QU: I have promised the Abbess that I would host a trader gathering at our monastery.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_EVENT_2_A_QU: I have promised the Abbess that I would help her favourite trader.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_EVENT_2_B_QU: I have promised the Abbess that I would help rebuild her library.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_MONASTERY_STEP_4_EVENT_2_C_QU: I have promised the Abbess that I would help her hometown.
EVENTS.MONASTERYMANUSCRIPTS_BARRELS_DESC: The Bishop seeks manuscripts of the Faith! Confident in your monastery's capability, his steward has barrels already prepared for you should you deliver manuscripts within the next few months.
EVENTS.MONASTERYMANUSCRIPTS_BARRELS_HAGGLE_LOSE: The steward carefully ponders your terms and concludes negotiations; the Bishop's words are clear: he will not offer additional barrels beyond the initial request.
EVENTS.MONASTERYMANUSCRIPTS_BARRELS_HAGGLE_WIN_: The steward carefully ponders your terms and concludes negotiations; he agrees to your words and pledges to grant additional barrels once the manuscripts are delivered.
EVENTS.MONASTERYMANUSCRIPTS_POLISHEDSTONES_DESC: The Bishop seeks manuscripts of the Faith! Confident in your monastery's capability, his steward has polished stones already prepared for you should you deliver manuscripts within the next few months.
EVENTS.MONASTERYMANUSCRIPTS_POLISHEDSTONES_HAGG: The steward carefully ponders your terms and concludes negotiations; the Bishop's words are clear: he will not offer additional polished stones beyond the initial request.
The steward carefully ponders your terms and concludes negotiations; he agrees to your words and pledges to grant additional polished stones once the manuscripts are delivered.
EVENTS.MONASTERYMANUSCRIPTS_SCULPTURE_DESC: The Bishop seeks manuscripts of the Faith! Confident in your monastery's capability, his personal sculptor is available for your monuments should you deliver manuscripts within the next few months.
EVENTS.MONASTERYMANUSCRIPTS_SCULPTURE_HAGGLE_LO: The steward carefully ponders your terms and concludes negotiations; the Bishop's words are clear: he will not offer his sculptor's time beyond the initial request.
EVENTS.MONASTERYMANUSCRIPTS_SCULPTURE_HAGGLE_WI: The steward carefully ponders your terms and concludes negotiations; he agrees to your words and pledges an additional commission from his sculptor once the manuscripts are delivered.
EVENTS.MONASTERYMANUSCRIPTS_CHOICE_A_TOOLTIP: The Bishop will send you resources immediately, although he trusts you to fulfil your order promptly.
EVENTS.MONASTERYMANUSCRIPTS_CHOICE_B: Our manuscripts are more valuable than that...
EVENTS.MONASTERYMANUSCRIPTS_CHOICE_B_TOOLTIP: The Bishop didn't plan on sending more resources right now, but you can haggle for more resources on delivery.
EVENTS.MONASTERYMANUSCRIPTS_HAGGLE_TOOLTIP_SUCC: Additional resources will be given on delivery.
EVENTS.MONASTERYMANUSCRIPTS_HAGGLE_TOOLTIP_FAIL: The Bishop's offer stays the same.
EVENTS.MONASTERYMANUSCRIPTS_CHOICE_NO_TOOLTIP: Manuscripts are a much-needed commodity; the Bishop will return later with a similar offer.
EVENTS.MONASTERYMANUSCRIPTS_STAINEDGLASS_DESC: The Bishop seeks manuscripts of the Faith! Confident in your monastery's capability, his personal glassmaker is available for your monuments should you deliver manuscripts within the next few months.
EVENTS.MONASTERYMANUSCRIPTS_STAINEDGLASS_HAGGLE: The steward carefully ponders your terms and concludes negotiations; the Bishop's words are clear: he will not offer his glassmaker's time beyond the initial request.
The steward carefully ponders your terms and concludes negotiations; he agrees to your words and pledges an additional commission from his glassmaker once the manuscripts are delivered.
EVENTS.MONASTERYMANUSCRIPTS_TOOLS_DESC: The Bishop seeks manuscripts of the Faith! Confident in your monastery's capability, his steward has tools already prepared for you should you deliver manuscripts within the next few months.
EVENTS.MONASTERYMANUSCRIPTS_TOOLS_HAGGLE_LOSE_D: The steward carefully ponders your terms and concludes negotiations; the Bishop's words are clear: he will not offer additional tools beyond the initial request.
EVENTS.MONASTERYMANUSCRIPTS_TOOLS_HAGGLE_WIN_DE: The steward carefully ponders your terms and concludes negotiations; he agrees to your words and pledges to grant additional tools once the manuscripts are delivered.
EVENTS.MONASTERYMANUSCRIPTS_QUEST_DESC: I promised to deliver manuscripts to the Bishop.
EVENTS.MONASTERYMANUSCRIPTS_FAILURE_DESC: You failed to deliver the manuscripts on time, losing considerable influence from the Bishop.
EVENTS.MONASTERYMANUSCRIPTS_SUCCESS_DESC: You delivered the manuscripts on time, earning considerable influence from the Bishop.
EVENTS.MONASTERYMANUSCRIPTS_SUCCESS_HAGGLE_DESC: You delivered the manuscripts on time, earning the negotiated resources and considerable influence from the Bishop.
EVENTS.MONASTERYMANUSCRIPTS_LOWINFLUENCE_DESC: The Bishop seeks manuscripts of the Faith! However, he is not sure your monastery has what it takes as it stands poorly with the Clergy. He offers you an opportunity to redeem your reputation should you deliver manuscripts within the next few months.
EVENTS.MONASTERYMANUSCRIPTS_LOWINFLUENCE_CHOICE: The Bishop trusts you to fulfil your order in due time.
EVENTS.MONASTERYMANUSCRIPTS_ACCEPT_DESC: The Bishop paid you the agreed amount of resources in exchange for the shipment of manuscripts you promised him.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_HOSTING_KNIGHT_BOW_DESC: The herald of the First Constable requires you to host and resupply Royal Knights returning from the war. They will need all the bare necessities, not to mention healing, training, and quality bows.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_QUEST_KNIGHTS_BOW_DESC: I have agreed to host and resupply a company of knights armed with recurved bows.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_HOSTING_KNIGHT_DESC: The herald of the First Constable requires you to host and resupply Royal Knights returning from the war. They will need all the bare necessities, not to mention healing and training.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_QUEST_KNIGHTS_DESC: I have pledged to host and attend to a royal company of knights.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_HOSTING_KNIGHT_SPEAR_DESC: The herald of the First Constable requires you to host and resupply Royal Knights returning from the war. They will need all the bare necessities, not to mention healing, training, and quality spears.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_QUEST_KNIGHTS_SPEAR_DESC: I have agreed to host and resupply a company of knights armed with polearms.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_HOSTING_KNIGHT_SWORD_DESC: The herald of the First Constable requires you to host and resupply Royal Knights returning from the war. They will need all the bare necessities, not to mention healing, training, and quality swords.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_QUEST_KNIGHTS_SWORD_DESC: I have agreed to host and resupply a company of knights armed with steel swords.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_HOSTING_RECRUIT_BOW_DESC: The herald of the First Constable requires you to host and resupply Royal Militiamen returning from the war. They will need all the bare necessities, not to mention healing, training, and simple bows.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_QUEST_RECRUITS_BOW_DESC: I have agreed to host and resupply a company of militiamen armed with short bows.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_HOSTING_RECRUIT_DESC: The herald of the First Constable requires you to host and resupply Royal Militiamen returning from the war. They will need all the bare necessities, not to mention healing and training.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_QUEST_RECRUITS_DESC: I have pledged to host and attend to a royal company of militiamen.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_HOSTING_RECRUIT_SPEAR_DES: The herald of the First Constable requires you to host and resupply Royal Militiamen returning from the war. They will need all the bare necessities, not to mention healing, training, and simple spears.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_QUEST_RECRUITS_SPEAR_DESC: I have agreed to host and resupply a company of militiamen armed with spears.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_HOSTING_RECRUIT_SWORD_DES: The herald of the First Constable requires you to host and resupply Royal Militiamen returning from the war. They will need all the bare necessities, not to mention healing, training, and simple swords.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_QUEST_RECRUITS_SWORD_DESC: I have agreed to host and resupply a company of militiamen armed with iron swords.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_HOSTING_SOLDIER_BOW_DESC: The herald of the First Constable requires you to host and resupply Royal Soldiers returning from the war. They will need all the bare necessities, not to mention healing, training, and quality bows.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_QUEST_SOLDIERS_BOW_DESC: I have agreed to host and resupply a company of soldiers armed with recurved bows.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_HOSTING_SOLDIER_DESC: The herald of the First Constable requires you to host and resupply Royal Soldiers returning from the war. They will need all the bare necessities, not to mention healing and training.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_QUEST_SOLDIERS_DESC: I have pledged to host and attend to a royal company of soldiers.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_HOSTING_SOLDIER_SPEAR_DES: The herald of the First Constable requires you to host and resupply Royal Soldiers returning from the war. They will need all the bare necessities, not to mention healing, training, and quality spears.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_QUEST_SOLDIERS_SPEAR_DESC: I have agreed to host and resupply a company of soldiers armed with polearms.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_HOSTING_SOLDIER_SWORD_DES: The herald of the First Constable requires you to host and resupply Royal Soldiers returning from the war. They will need all the bare necessities, not to mention healing, training, and quality swords.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_QUEST_SOLDIERS_SWORD_DESC: I have agreed to host and resupply a company of soldiers armed with steel swords.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_HOSTING_KNIGHT_CHOICE_A: It is an honour to supply them.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_HOSTING_RECRUIT_CHOICE_A: We will train them as best we can.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_HOSTING_CHOICE_A_TOOLTIP: The First Constable expects you to host and resupply one of the King's companies.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_HOSTING_CHOICE_NO: Tell our liege I must decline.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_HOSTING_CHOICE_NO_TOOLTIP: The herald will eventually return with a similar request.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_WELCOME_DESC:
The King took notice of your castle! Standing tall and proud by the realm's outskirts, he intends to use it to attend his weary royal companies.

The King wants you to send a Royal Courtier to his court so they can discuss this matter further.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_WELCOME_CHOICE_A: I will send an envoy at once!
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_WELCOME_CHOICE_A_TOOLTIP: The King expects you to mandate a Royal Courtier to visit his court.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_HOSTING_FAILURE_DESC: The King's company marched away, demoralized and unfit for battle.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_HOSTING_SUCCESS_DESC: To the satisfaction of the First Constable, the King's company left your village prepped and ready for battle.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_KNIGHTS_QUEST_OBJECTIVE: Attend the Royal Company of Knights with 80% approval.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_RECRUITS_QUEST_OBJECTIVE: Attend the Royal Company of Militiamen with 80% approval.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_SOLDIERS_QUEST_OBJECTIVE: Attend the Royal Company of Soldiers with 80% approval.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_KNIGHTS_GROUPKEY: A Royal Company of Knights is approaching your village
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_SOLDIERS_GROUPKEY: A Royal Company of Soldiers is approaching your village
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_RECRUITS_GROUPKEY: A Royal Company of Militiamen is approaching your village
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_QUEST_OBJECTIVE_RESUP: Attend to a weary Royal Company
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_1_DESC:
The realm is in turmoil! The First Constable takes the lead, a dame appointed by the King to command the royal army. 

She has set her sights on your village, given its strategic location. Her plan? Prepare your village by training and sending out military companies within the area!
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_1_CHOICE_A_TOOLT: The First Constable will expect you to build a castle and deploy a military company.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_2_DESC: Your village has ample fortifications! The First Constable is content with what you have achieved so far. She believes it is time for you to expand your walls, recruit more combatants, and attend to the King's Royal Companies!
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_2_CHOICE_A: We will not let you down!
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_2_CHOICE_A_TOOLT: The First Constable will expect you to build additional walls, recruit more combatants, and attend to the King's Royal Companies.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_3_DESC: War is raging at the borders, but your fortress stands strong! The First Constable is pleased with your progress and states that your land is a vital position she can rely on. Wage war in the King's name, for he might reward you personally!
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_3_CHOICE_A: We will fight for our land!
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_3_CHOICE_A_TOOLT: The First Constable will expect you to promote more combatants, produce new weapons, and join the King in a military campaign.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_DESC: Your mighty forces and indomitable fortress impress the First Constable, who hails your domain as a beacon of military prowess! Keep fortifying and expanding in the King's name; such dedication may earn you the highest royal honours.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_CHOICE_A_TOOLT: The First Constable will expect you to build more walls, recruit more combatants, and serve the King personally!
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_KING_HOSTING_DES: Talks at the royal court imply your fortress is so imposing that enemies never dare approach it! The King longs to see this legendary castle for himself and "humbly" asks you to host him, his suite, and his royal company for a short stay.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_KING_HOSTING_CHO: The King will expect to stay at your castle for a few months.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_REWARD_DESC: Never has your Liege been hosted so magnificently, nor in such an extraordinary fortress! As the King's favoured vassal, your loyalty and service shall be rewarded with untold riches—royal gold beyond measure.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_REWARD_CHOICE_A: It was an honour to host the royal court, my liege!
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_REWARD_CHOICE_TOOLTIP: The King will grant you riches.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_CHOICE_NO_TOOLTIP: The envoy of the Kingdom will ask you again later.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_EVENT_1_A_DESC: The King believes your castle may have suitable quarters for more of his knights! They have been busy in distant realms lately and need distractions to keep their spirits high.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_EVENT_1_A_CHOI: Your knights are welcome at our castle.
The King will summon more royal knights to reside at your castle.
Let our companies share the road.
The King will expect you to deploy a company to join his knights.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_EVENT_1_B_DESC: The King believes your castle would be a suitable haven for his soldiers! They suffered terrible defeats at the hands of enemies and now need to regroup at a safe location.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_EVENT_1_B_CHOI: We will make sure your soldiers are cared for.
The King will invite over a royal company of combat-weary soldiers.
I will send a company to help them out.
The King will expect you to deploy a company to support his combat-weary soldiers.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_EVENT_1_C_DESC: The King believes your castle would be a suitable training ground for his new militiamen! It seems the latest conscription effort was too effective, and now, he's stuck with companies of ne'er-do-well.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_EVENT_1_C_CHOI: Your militiamen are welcome to train here.
The King will summon royal conscripts to train at your castle.
My veterans will travel to them and train them.
The King will expect you to deploy a company to train his conscripts.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_EVENT_1_CHOICE: You know, I've heard of this other castle...
The King will redirect his company to another castle outside your lands.
Not to question your decision, but...
Arguing the King's decision might irritate him.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_EVENT_2_A_DESC: The King has vital matters in mind! Specifically, he needs you to find the most sacred of relics — the Holy Commonware! However, he has no idea where to find this... Fork? Bowl? Mug?
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_EVENT_2_A_CHOI: I will appoint my most pious warriors!
The King will expect you to deploy a company to search for this relic.
Oh, I have plenty of commonware - pick what you need!
The King will expect to browse through a broad selection of goods.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_EVENT_2_B_DESC: The King has vital matters in mind! Specifically, he needs you to deal with one of his rivals. However, he can't tell you the specifics or how to deal with it. Just make it happen, okay?
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_EVENT_2_B_CHOI: I will pass on the 'details' to my companies.
The King will expect you to deploy a company to mess with his rival.
Your best Bailiff will attempt to deal with the King's rival.
The King's rival is in trouble.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_EVENT_2_C_DESC: The King has vital matters in mind! Specifically, he needs you to slay a pig. Not just any pig, mind you, but the nefarious King-Slaying Boar!
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_EVENT_2_C_CHOI: A mere hog is no match for my companies!
The King will expect you to deploy a company to slay that beast.
Companies? Let my best hunter do the work.
Your best Hunter will attempt to hunt the beast.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_EVENT_2_CHOICE: The First Constable surely has soldiers available...
You will use your influence with the First Constable to take the task in your stead.
Is this quest even worthy of a king?
Questioning decisions from the King might get you in trouble.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_EVENT_3_A_DESC: The King is bored! It is a grave matter, for your Liege expects you to entertain him. Lately, the monarch has enjoyed watching knights train at the castle. Perhaps he would enjoy watching some duels?
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_EVENT_3_A_CHOI: My best swordsmen will fight for you!
Your best swordsman will attempt to impress the King.
Let your knights fight with my finest steel.
You will gift the King some of your finest swords.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_EVENT_3_B_DESC: The King is bored! It is a grave matter, for your Liege expects you to entertain him. Lately, the monarch has taken to inviting random guests to his meals. Surely he would enjoy a banquet?
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_EVENT_3_B_CHOI: My best cook will grill us a feast!
Your best cook will attempt to impress the King.
Let's enjoy ourselves like common folk!
Your best taverner will attempt to impress the King.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_EVENT_3_C_DESC: The King is bored! It is a grave matter, for your Liege expects you to entertain him. Lately, the monarch has taken to wearing his fanciest clothes. Surely he misses the opulence of his court?
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_EVENT_3_C_CHOI: Witness the finest craftsmanship in all of the realm!
Your best weaponsmith will attempt to impress the King.
Let me indulge you with jewels from across the world.
You will gift the King a chest full of jewellery.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_EVENT_3_CHOICE: Oh, have you heard about this noble?
You will use your influence to gossip about the realm's nobility and distract the King.
Here's a funny one: A Prior and a Bailiff walk into a tavern...
Entertaining the King by yourself might get you in trouble.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_1_A_MTC_DESC: Your company is expected to regroup with some of the King's knights by the realm's borders. Once on the road, they are expected to break kegs and bones together.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_1_B_MTC_DESC: A royal company is having a bad time behind enemy lines. Unwilling to lose anyone, the King expects your combatants to get his company home safely.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_1_C_MTC_DESC: The King wishes for your company to train his militiamen in the subtle art of donning kettle-like hats, standing still for hours, and smashing bad people.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_2_A_MTC_DESC: All it takes is a strange dream for a monarch to suddenly desire old cups and cracked bowls. Kings and their whimsical tastes...
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_2_B_MTC_DESC: The King has a fair share of allies and rivals. One of the latter has been involved in some concerning schemes, possibly even a plot against the King! Perhaps your combatants should look into it?
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_2_C_MTC_DESC: Dreaded assassin of drunk monarchs, it is said that this piglet is the foulest, cruel, and most bad-tempered swine you ever set eyes on!
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_REWARD_COMPLETION_DES: You are the King's favourite and earned his gratitude!
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_1_SUCCESS_DESC: You helped the realm by building a castle and training combatants.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_2_SUCCESS_DESC: You strengthened your castle into a fortress and supported the King's army.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_3_SUCCESS_DESC: You forged a powerful battalion and waged war in the name of the King.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_SUCCESS_DESC: You expanded your fortress into a valuable strategic position within the realm.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_KING_HOSTING_SUC: The King had a delightful stay and wholeheartedly declared you were his favourite vassal!
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_EVENT_FAILURE_: The King is irritated by your actions. This will impact his stay at your castle.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_EVENT_SUCCESS_: The King is delighted with your actions. This will impact his stay at your castle.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_FAILURE_DESC: The King trusts that you will be a more suitable host next time.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_1_QUEST_DESC: I have promised the First Constable we would build a castle and train a military company.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_2_QUEST_DESC: I have promised the First Constable we would improve our castle and support the Royal Companies.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_3_QUEST_DESC: I have promised the First Constable to prepare our army for war.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_QUEST_DESC: I have promised the First Constable we will build the strongest castle in the realm.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_QUEST_GROUPKEY: The King and his suite are approaching your village.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_KING_HOSTING_QUE: I have invited the King and his suite to stay in our fortress for a few months.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_QUEST_OBJECTIVE_KING_: Host the King and his suite with 95% approval.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_EVENT_1_A_QUES: I have agreed to attend a Royal Company of Knights.
A company of royal knights is approaching your village.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_EVENT_1_B_QUES: I have agreed to attend a Royal Company of Soldiers.
A royal company of soldiers is approaching your village.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_EVENT_1_C_QUES: I have agreed to attend a Royal Company of Militiamen.
A royal company of militiamen is approaching your village.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_EVENT_2_A_QUES: I have suggested searching for Holy Commonware amongst our goods.
EVENTS.KINGDOMSPEARLOAN_OFFER_DESC: The First Constable learned of your Castle's difficulties in keeping your combatants well-armed. Initially expecting supplies from your Castle to her army, she reluctantly offers to assist you by sending spears.
EVENTS.KINGDOMSPEARLOAN_OFFER_CHOICE_A: This will not happen again, I promise!
EVENTS.KINGDOMSPEARLOAN_OFFER_CHOICE_A_TOOLTIP: The First Constable will send you spears. This will impact your influence within the Kingdom.
EVENTS.KINGDOMSPEARLOAN_OFFER_CHOICE_NO: Thank you, but we will manage without.
EVENTS.KINGDOMSPEARLOAN_OFFER_CHOICE_NO_TOOLTIP: The First Constable might offer her help again later, should you still need spears.
EVENTS.KINGDOMSPEARLOAN_OFFER_GIVEN_DESC: You received a shipment of spears from the First Constable. Crafting those should be your next priority!
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_KINGHOSTING_QUEST_DESC: I promised the King that I would send an envoy to his court.
EVENTS.KINGDOMWAR_INTRO_MISSION_00_DESC:
Tales of your expanding companies have piqued the interest of your King! He plans to grant you the honour of fighting alongside the Royal Companies, but first, he wants to ensure your companies are up to the task.

The King wants you to send a Royal Courtier to his court so they can discuss this matter further.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_KINGDOM_STEP_4_INTRO_DESC:
Your brave deeds have become well-known throughout the realm, and the King greatly appreciates them. He now thinks it's high time your castle welcomes royal guests!

The King wants you to send a Royal Courtier to his court so they can discuss this matter further.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_KINGSUMMON_ATTENDCOURT_DE: You have heeded the call of your King! Your trusted Courtier will speak on your behalf within the grandeur of the royal court.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_KINGSUMMON_PAUSE_DESC: After a brief session, the royal court agreed to pause the coming of Royal Companies to your Castle.
EVENTS.KINGDOMHOSTING_KINGSUMMON_RESUME_DESC: The royal court salutes your decision to resume the coming of Royal Companies to your Castle.
EVENTS.ADVANCEDONBOARDING_SECONDCOMPANY_DESC: Villagers call for you to establish a new military company! They believe it will generate more resources and allow you to assign them to patrols, which will help increase your village's population density.
EVENTS.ADVANCEDONBOARDING_SECONDCOMPANY_COMPLET: Extra companies mean extra resources! Alternate them between missions and training to keep resources flowing steadily.
EVENTS.ADVANCEDONBOARDING_SECONDCOMPANY_QUEST_D: I have agreed to form a new Company.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_STEP_1_DESC:
The Elders have heard of your dedication to the common folk. Visiting you on behalf of their people, they advise you to petition the Seneschal for a City Charter. 

Becoming an independent city, they say, will grant your village the freedom to forge its own path, free from the sway of Clergy and Nobles alike.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_STEP_1_CHOICE_A_TOOLTIP: The Elders will expect you to build a village for their people.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_STEP_2_DESC:
In his royal office, strewn with lawbooks and missives, the Seneschal listens to your plea and declares: your village shows promise but is not yet ready.

Focus on the essentials—build a Tavern to delight your commoners, welcome travellers, and grow your coffers through taxation.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_STEP_2_CHOICE_A_TOOLTIP: Your people will expect your village to grow further.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_STEP_3_DESC:
The Seneschal, drawn by travellers' tales of your village's progress, acknowledges its impressive growth since your last audience!

Now prepared to welcome wealthy citizens—the foundation of great cities—your village nears the honour of a city charter.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_STEP_3_CHOICE_A_TOOLTIP: Your people will expect citizens to reside in your village.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_STEP_4_DESC:
Upon hearing that your villagers are comfortably settled, the Elders believe it is time for you to seek the City Charter!

Once you have enough citizens and the City Belfry is complete, you will be ready to request an audience with the Seneschal once more.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_STEP_4_CHOICE_A_TOOLTIP: Your people will expect your city to have a City Belfry.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_DESC:
From his cluttered office, the Seneschal gladly receives news of your village, noting its growing influence across the realm!

He accepts your invitation as a short but welcome break from other duties. It will be a good opportunity for him to study local legislation and meet your city's Elders.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_CHOICE_A: It will be a pleasure to have you!
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_CHOICE_A_TOOLTI: The Seneschal will expect to stay in your village for a few months.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_CHOICE_NO_TOOLTIP: You will have opportunities to do this event again later.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_REWARD_DESC:
As the Seneschal bestows the City Charter upon you, a few honourable Elders step forward to express their gratitude.

They speak of the pride that will echo through generations, for your deeds have granted your people the honour of standing as their own!
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_REWARD_CHOICE_A: To the city that is truly ours!
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_REWARD_CHOICE_TOOLTIP: Your villagers will be much happier.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_STEP_1_QUEST_DESC: I have promised the Elders we would build a village and contact the Seneschal.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_STEP_1_MANDATE_TITLE: Requesting an audience with the Seneschal
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_STEP_1_MANDATE_QUEST_DE: I promised the Elders I would meet with the Seneschal to request a city charter.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_STEP_2_QUEST_DESC: I have assured the Seneschal that I will improve my village.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_STEP_3_QUEST_DESC: I have agreed to welcome citizens to my village.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_STEP_4_QUEST_DESC: I have agreed about the final step before becoming sovereign.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_QUEST_DESC: I have invited the Seneschal to stay in our village for a few months.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_GROUPKEY: The Seneschal is approaching your village.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_1_A_DESC: The Elders plan to surprise the Seneschal by dedicating him a new fountain! They hope he will appreciate how its elegant design and sparkling waters reflect the village's flourishing growth.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_1_A_CHOIC: The Elders will expect you to build a beautiful fountain.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_1_A_QUEST: I assured the Elders I would build a beautiful fountain for the Seneschal.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_1_B_DESC: The Elders plan to surprise the Seneschal by dedicating him a Tavern! They believe there is no better way to experience the city's spirit than by sharing a fine drink with its locals.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_1_B_CHOIC: The Elders will expect you to provide them with a splendid Tavern.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_1_B_QUEST: I promised the Elders I would provide them with a splendid Tavern.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_1_C_DESC: The Elders plan to surprise the Seneschal by dedicating him a Market Hall! They trust its lively stalls will proclaim your village's potential as a thriving, independent city.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_1_C_CHOIC: The Elders will expect you to provide them with a splendid Market Hall.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_1_C_QUEST: I promised the Elders I would provide them with a splendid Market Hall.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_1_CHOICE_: My best Builder will think of something.
Your best Builder will attempt to craft something for the Seneschal.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_1_TOOLTIP: The Seneschal is honoured by your Builder's creation.
The Seneschal is mortified by your Builder's creation.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_CHOICE_C: Why don't you take care of it?
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_CHOICE_C_: You will use your influence with the Elders to have them handle the task in your stead.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_1_CHOICE_: I would rather not surprise him.
Who is to say the Seneschal even enjoys surprises?
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_2_A_DESC: The Elders have decided a gift is in order! By presenting the Seneschal with a generous sum of coins, they hope to demonstrate the wealth of your community.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_2_A_CHOIC: Who would dislike a few spare coins?
The Elders will expect you to give them a fair sum of coins.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_2_A_QUEST: I promised the Elders I would give them coins to gift the Seneschal.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_2_B_DESC: The Elders have decided a gift is in order! By offering the Seneschal with generous casks of the local bógyóbor, they hope to warm him to the cause of your people.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_2_B_CHOIC: The Elders will expect you to give them a large amount of bógyóbor.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_2_B_QUEST: I promised the Elders I would give them bógyóbor to sway the Seneschal.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_2_C_DESC: The Elders have decided a gift is in order! They intend to dazzle the Seneschal with opulent jewellery—but naturally, they expect you to supply the offering.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_2_C_CHOIC: Nothing is too great for our cause!
The Elders will expect you to give them Jewellery.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_2_C_QUEST: I promised to give the Elders Jewellery to gift the Seneschal.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_2_CHOICE_: Let my best Tax Collector handle the gift.
Your best Tax Collector will attempt to collect and offer the gift to the Seneschal.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_2_TOOLTIP: The Seneschal is enchanted by your Tax Collector's gift.
The Seneschal is outraged by your Tax Collector's gift.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_2_CHOICE_: Who knows how the Seneschal will respond to such an attempt?
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_3_A_DESC: The Elders have one final trick up their sleeves: a grand celebration to bid the Seneschal farewell! They ask you to organise a private feast with fine food and drinks and ensure the comfort of the few distinguished Elders they plan to invite.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_3_A_CHOIC: The Elders will expect you to handle the feast.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_3_A_QUEST: I have promised the Elders I would prepare the feast for the Seneschal.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_3_GUEST_D: I have promised the Elders I would attend to the comfort of the visiting Elders.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_3_B_DESC: The Elders have one final trick up their sleeves: a grand celebration to bid the Seneschal farewell! They ask you to organise festivities with local drinks and ensure the comfort of the many Elders they plan to invite from neighbouring villages.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_3_B_CHOIC: These will be celebrations to remember!
The Elders will expect you to handle the festivities.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_3_B_QUEST: I have promised the Elders I would take care of the drinks for the festivities.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_3_C_DESC: The Elders have one final trick up their sleeves: a grand celebration to bid the Seneschal farewell! Expecting a large gathering of Elders from neighbouring villages, they ask you to ensure the comfort of all attendees during the festivities.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_3_C_CHOIC: The Elders will expect you to handle the gathering.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_3_CHOICE_: That sounds like something my best Taverner could handle!
Your best Taverner will attempt to organise celebrations for the Seneschal.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_3_TOOLTIP: The Seneschal has a great time at your Taverner's revelries.
The Seneschal is exhausted by your Taverner's revelries.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_3_CHOICE_: I think he's tired of your schemes.
Who knows if the Seneschal even enjoys festivities?
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_STEP_1_SUCCESS_DESC: You founded a village and appointed a Bailiff as your trusted right hand.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_STEP_2_SUCCESS_DESC: You transformed your humble village into a thriving community.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_STEP_3_SUCCESS_DESC: You grew your village into a flourishing city.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_STEP_4_SUCCESS_DESC: You built a grand City Belfry and secured your city's rightful sovereignty.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_FAILURE_DESC: The Seneschal believes your city still needs some refinement. He will await the return of your Bailiff when the time is right.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_SUCCESS_DESC: The Seneschal had a wonderful time in your city! Impressed by your hospitality, he departs with a promise to ensure your city enjoys favourable legislative support.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_FAILURE_D: The Seneschal is somewhat displeased by recent events, which will influence his final opinion about his stay.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_EVENT_SUCCESS_D: The Seneschal is pleasantly surprised by recent events, which will influence his final opinion about his stay.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_REWARD_COMPLETION_DESC: You have earned the City Charter and secured your city's sovereignty!
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_INTRO_DESC:
Now that your city has everything it needs to stand on its own, the Elders believe it is time to earn the approval of the realm's most esteemed legislator.

They suggest inviting the Seneschal to stay for a few weeks and ensuring he feels welcome and comfortable in your city.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_INTRO_CHOICE_A: Let's make sure he feels at home.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_HOSTING_INTRO_CHOICE_A_: The Elders will expect you to invite the Seneschal to stay for a few months.
EVENTS.ASPIRATION_LABOR_STEP_HOSTING_MANDATE_QU: I have agreed with the Elders to invite the Seneschal to our city.
EVENTS.LABORLODGING_INTRO_DESC: A weary traveller passes by, pleasantly surprised to find lodging. They remark that no one along their route knew an inn was open! Relieved by the discovery, they ask if they may share the news.
EVENTS.LABORLODGING_INTRO_CHOICE_A_TOOLTIP: Travellers will now pass through your village regularly. You can pause the Inn Lodge to halt all arrivals.
EVENTS.LABORLODGING_INTRO_CHOICE_LATER: I would rather not receive anyone right now.
EVENTS.LABORLODGING_INTRO_CHOICE_LATER_TOOLTIP: Regular travellers will not visit until you agree to let them spread the word. You can pause the Inn Lodge to halt all arrivals.
